name: wp-field-plugin
description: Universal HTML field generator for WordPress with React UI support

scripts.build: npm run build:scss && vite build && vite build --config vite.admin-shell.config.js && vite build --config vite.wizard.config.js && vite build --config vite.components.config.js
scripts.build:ui: vite build --config vite.admin-shell.config.js && vite build --config vite.wizard.config.js
